text:
On Mon, 1 Feb 1999, Maurice Castro wrote:

> >Synopsis:       Port update
 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> 	Two share files are included

Shar files, actually. Secondly, please please please use patch(1) to send
port updates, not shar.

I believe this is all outlined in
http://www.FreeBSD.org/handbook/porting.html
